common.notImplemented: This feature is coming in a future update.

welcome.title: Welcome to AI Tutor
welcome.subtitle: Your personal AI-powered study companion for electrical engineering.
welcome.description: Get started by creating your first course. You can then upload materials, chat with AI, generate flashcards, and much more.

courses.title: Courses
courses.name: Course name
courses.empty: No courses yet. Create your first course!

knowledge.title: Internal Knowledge
knowledge.emptyHint: Upload your course materials to get started — lecture notes, exams, transcripts, and more.
knowledge.dragDrop: Drag & drop a file here, or click to select
knowledge.duplicate: This file was already uploaded as "{{name}}"
knowledge.deleteError: Failed to delete file. Please try again.
knowledge.scanWarningTooltip: File was processed but content may not have been fully extracted

learning.title: Learning
learning.subtitle: Choose what you want to study
learning.summaryDesc: Get a comprehensive summary of any topic from your course materials
learning.quizzesDesc: Test your knowledge with AI-generated quizzes

topicSummary.title: Topic Summary
topicSummary.noTopics: No topics tracked yet. Start studying to build your topic history.
topicSummary.guidancePlaceholder: Optional: guide the summary (e.g. 'focus on formulas', 'explain intuitively')
topicSummary.chatPlaceholder: Ask a follow-up question about this topic...
topicSummary.noDocuments: No course materials uploaded yet. Go to Internal Knowledge and upload lecture notes or textbooks first.

flashcards.title: Flashcards
flashcards.empty: No flashcards yet. Generate some from your documents!
flashcards.generateSuccess: ✓ Cards generated! Click the deck to review.

config.title: Flashcard Session Setup
config.noCardsGenerated: No flashcards were generated. Make sure the selected documents have finished processing.
config.noDocs: No documents available. Upload materials first.

homework.title: Homework Help
homework.subtitle: Upload a photo or PDF of your homework for AI feedback
homework.dragDrop: Drag & drop an image or PDF here
homework.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the assignment or what you need help with...
homework.chatPlaceholder: Ask a follow-up question about the feedback...
homework.chatContextPrefix: Here is the feedback I received on my homework
homework.chatHint: Ask a follow-up question about the feedback above

examAnalysis.title: Exam Analysis
examAnalysis.uploadHint: Upload a solved exam (PDF or image) to get detailed per-topic analysis
examAnalysis.uploadReferenceHint: Upload the original exam or a model solution for comparison
examAnalysis.dragDrop: Drag & drop here, or click to select
examAnalysis.guidancePlaceholder: Guide the analysis (e.g. 'focus on my calculation errors', 'compare writing style')
examAnalysis.experiencePlaceholder: Describe how the exam went — timing, hard questions, how you felt during the exam...
examAnalysis.noFile: Please upload an exam file first
examAnalysis.savedToProfile: Analysis saved to your learning profile
examAnalysis.comingSoon: Full exam analysis coming soon. Upload your exam to begin.

diagnosis.title: Learning Status Diagnosis
diagnosis.subtitle: Your learning profile for this course
diagnosis.noData: No learning data yet for this course. Start studying to see your progress!
diagnosis.noDataTopic: Insufficient data yet to assess knowledge
diagnosis.examTopicsHint: Topics that appeared most frequently in your past exams
diagnosis.examTopicsInsufficient: At least 3 past exams are required to analyze exam topics

recommendations.title: Study Recommendations
recommendations.subtitle: Based on your exam topics and learning history
recommendations.noData: No recommendations yet. Upload past exams and study more topics to get personalized recommendations.
recommendations.noRecs: No study recommendations at this time

settings.title: Settings
settings.teachingStyleHint: How should the AI communicate with you?
settings.styleNotesPlaceholder: e.g. 'Use intuitive explanations', 'Skip lengthy proofs', 'Always show units'

styles.balancedDesc: Mix of encouragement and clear correction

unifiedChat.title: Ask the Chat
unifiedChat.attachExamFirst: Please attach an exam file first
unifiedChat.attachHomeworkFirst: Please attach a homework file first
unifiedChat.examWelcome:
**Exam Analysis** 📋

Attach your exam file below, then in the text box you can add:
- **Analysis guidance** – any specific aspects to focus on
- **Your experience** – how did the exam go?

Both are optional. Click **Analyze** when ready.
